name: eacl-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for EACL (Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics) submissions built around ACL Rolling Review: single-cycle timing, ARR submission checks, author response, commitment to EACL, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, the Responsible NLP checklist, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the EACL 2027 CFP, aclrollingreview.org, OpenReview ARR groups, and the ACL Anthology, checked on 2026-07-09.
